name: Mitsui E&S Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Mitsui E&S Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in shipbuilding and engineering businesses worldwide. The company operates through Ship, Ocean Development, Machinery, Engineering, and Others segments. The Ship segment builds bulk carriers, oil tankers, LNG carriers, research vessel/training vessels, fishery patrol vessels, high-speed vessels, naval ships/patrol ships, and submersibles. The Ocean Development segment provides floating production storage offloading systems. The Machinery segment offers marine diesel engines, gas turbines and gas engine co-generation systems, process compressors, top pressure recovery turbine generating systems, reactors/heat exchangers, rotary dryers/coal moistures controllers, portainers, transtainers, container terminal management systems, etc. The Engineering segment operates biomass and biogas power plants; wind power facility; power plant engineering and construction business; an environmental facility; and diesel engine generating, petro-chemical, and inorganic chemical plants. The Others segment engages in the real estate development and system development businesses. The company was formerly known as Mitsui Engineering & Shipbuilding Co., Ltd. Mitsui E&S Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
